name: thousandeyes
description: Connect Codex to the ThousandEyes MCP server for network intelligence workflows.

interface.longDescription: Use ThousandEyes network intelligence workflows in Codex through the hosted ThousandEyes MCP server.
defaultPrompt: Compare current internet performance for Salesforce between our London and Tokyo offices.
Run an HTTP test to https://www.okta.com from our Seattle and San Francisco agents.
Troubleshoot this morning's Microsoft 365 slowdown and suggest the probable fault domain.
